mapper.sql: select id, user_id, conversation_id, memory_type, memory_key, memory_value, create_time, update_time from ai_long_term_memory
mapper.insert: insert into ai_long_term_memory(user_id, conversation_id, memory_type, memory_key, memory_value) values(#{userId}, #{conversationId}, #{memoryType}, #{memoryKey}, #{memoryValue})
mapper.update: update ai_long_term_memory set conversation_id = #{conversationId}, memory_value = #{memoryValue}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{id}
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc
